short_summary: El Niño confirmed, Xi in Pyongyang
rationale: El Niño confirmation sustains indirect cost-of-living risk for Poland; Xi's Pyongyang visit is now an established fact (already priced in last cycle); no new qualitative shocks this cycle.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's visit materialised, deepening the authoritarian axis. Already registered last cycle as an uptick; this cycle it is continuation of that established fact.

top_events.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is active, raising risks of commodity price shocks and energy cost pressures that indirectly affect Polish households.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17
top_events.summary: Ongoing pattern of Israeli strikes in Lebanon; no escalation beyond established baseline, minimal direct relevance to Poland.
